new_classes.label_en: Wine with Protected Designation of Origin (PDO) in containers ≤ 2 L – other (subheading 2204 21 74)
new_classes.label_de: Wein mit geschützter Ursprungsbezeichnung (g.U.) in Behältnissen ≤ 2 L – andere (Unterposition 2204 21 74)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO) as defined in additional note 6(a) to Chapter 22, presented in containers with a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres; classified under CN subheading 2204 21 74 within the range 2204 21 11 to 2204 21 78.

coverage_explanation:
The legal text for 22042174 states only that it covers "Wine with a protected designation of origin (PDO) – see additional note 6(a) to this chapter" within the container range ≤ 2 L. The two key criteria – PDO status and small container (≤ 2 L) – are captured via existing TBox classes (ProtectedDesignationOfOriginOrGeographicalIndicationQuality and SmallContainer). A complement restriction against the sibling class PDOWineSmallContainer22042168 marks the "other" residual nature of 22042174.

Coverage is reduced from 1.0 for the following reasons:
1. Additional note 6(a) defines the exact conditions for PDO qualification (e.g. specific geographic areas, wine types, minimum/maximum actual alcoholic strength by volume thresholds that differ by specific sub-codes within 2204 21 11–78); these fine-grained criteria are not yet represented in the TBox and cannot be fully expressed without them.
2. The "other" (residual) character of 22042174 relative to all named PDO sub-codes within 2204 21 (e.g., 22042123 Tokaj, 22042168) is only partially captured by the single complement against 22042168; a full complement against all sibling named PDO codes would be needed for complete discrimination.
3. No alcohol-by-volume range restrictions specific to this sub-code are modelled.
